category_sources: source_facts.description says SimGrid studies behavior of large-scale distributed systems; official documentation describes simulations of grids, clouds, clusters, HPC, and peer-to-peer systems.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and documentation use the display name SimGrid.
docs_sources: Official SimGrid documentation site provides introduction, installation, and full latest docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://gitlab.inria.fr/simgrid/simgrid; per instruction repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description, source_facts.executables, and official SimGrid docs describe distributed-system simulation, HPC/cloud models, and SMPI tools.
